title: Top Liberal Arts Education Colleges in Noida, Uttar Pradesh
content: Publication WOS/Scopus Student Publication Patent Published/Granted The School of Liberal Education (SOLE) at Galgotias University offers a variety of enriching and value-added programs to its students. SOLE provides ample opportunities for experiential learning, with a curriculum and syllabus that is regularly updated to meet the needs of today's society. The school invites renowned experts in the field to participate in regular seminars, conferences, and lectures, providing students with a comprehensive education. SOLE also emphasizes a classroom-to-field approach, offering regular field experience and internships with renowned NGOs and human rights groups such as Pravah and Goonj. The program offers a large, multidisciplinary course basket for students to choose from, and is implemented through a Choice-Based Credit Course system. The faculty at SOLE is rich in experience and knowledge, providing students with regular mentoring and remedial and tutorial classes. SOLE regularly benchmarks its curriculum with the best in academia, and implements the policies of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020. SOLE offers programs in English, Economics, Psychology, Political Science, and Sociology, with regular outreach activities to organizations and villages to enhance the learning experience of its students. SOLE ensures that its campus, curriculum, and activities enhance the student's overall learning experience, making them physically fit, mentally sharp, and spiritually elevated. Galgotias University provides excellent research facilities to its students and faculty members. The university has a state-of-the-art library that houses over 10,000 books, with on-demand book facilities for students and faculty members. Moreover, the university has subscribed to popular and renowned journals from publishers such as Elsevier, Routledge, Emerald, JSTOR, and Oxford, providing the students and faculty members with access to the best journals in their respective fields. Program: B.Pharm Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business UP Government University Grants Commission All India Council for Technical Education The Bar Council of India Indian Nursing Council National Council for Teacher Education. Pharmacy Council of India The Indian Association of Physiotherapists Association of Indian Universities Galgotias University accredited by NAAC with the A+ Embrace the Opportunities of Our Dynamic Sports and Extracurricular Scene Take your Game to the Next Level with our Top-Notch Sports Infrastructure Shivangi negi 2020-2023Being a student at Galgotias University's School of Liberal Education makes me feel grateful and proud. By offering an extraordinarily comprehensive and integrated learning environment, my department enabled me to develop my talent and potential. I am appreciative of my teachers' constant encouragement to strive for excellence and support of my confidence. Along with my education, the institution has provided me a lot of memories that I will treasure forever. Disha Singh 2020-2023I am in the last semester of graduation in B.A(Hons.) Political Science from school of liberal education at Galgotias University. Before taking admission in this prestigious institute, I was an average student without any aim in life and wasn’t able to choose my desired path of career. But after coming to this institute, I met with the faculty of Political Science department and they were very helpful and understanding .They not only taught us to how to go ahead in life with studying political science but also showed us various other paths in how we can excel in life. This made me realise what I wanted to do and where my interest lies.I chose to do MBA.I recently heard about a job requirement in a company called NIRVONIX HEALTHCARE as a “ManagementTrainee”.I thought of this as a good opportunity for future thus gave an interview and got selected for the position. Now I am very disciplined and focused towards my career. Deepak Sharma 2019-2022I have completed my graduation in B.A(Hons.) Sociology from school of liberal education at Galgotias University. Before coming to this prestigious institute, I was an average student and have least interest in studying. But after coming to this institute, I met the faculty of Sociology department as they are very helpful and they have a very creative style of teaching. While delivering any lecture, teachers make us think on that particular topic or idea. They make us feel the concept of society. They give us various activities to do like watching a movie or documentary, reading books, visiting places like NGO’s or research based visit. By doing all these activities I have gained very much interest in studying Sociology. Also I got placement in U.S based organisation UNICEF(United Nations International Children Emergency Fund). I scored 9.2 CGPA with a gold medal. Now studying becomes a fun activity for me.
